bugs_found: Market prob used single-side implied with vig (home only) - inflated favorites by ~3-4%
Away odds fabricated via 1/(1-implied) instead of real away price
Platt calibration file existed but never loaded/applied - gap was -5.9% (market hot)
Linear prob addition: 14 edges * 0.05-0.12 could sum to >0.6 -> 95%+ saturation via simulation trick, now removed
Weights 2x too high: FIP 0.12, OPS 0.55 etc caused overconfidence
K-line random.random() -0.5 made prop random, not model based
Weather edge binary 0.02 not using wind
fixes_applied: Added _devig_probs() - de-vig both sides: home_true = hi/(hi+ai)
Fetch real away odds from Odds API
Added load_platt_calibration() and apply_platt_calibration() with clamping [0.5-1.5]a, [-0.6-0.6]b
K-line deterministic from K/9 vs league avg
Tighter clamp 0.12-0.88 instead of 0.15-0.85 to allow more realistic extremes after calibration
fixes.expected_accuracy_improvement: Brier score should improve from ~0.26 to ~0.23-0.24, calibration gap from -5.9% to <2%, overconfidence in 75-80% bucket reduced

bugs_found: QB edge 0.006 * 50 QBR diff = 0.30 = 30% prob swing from single factor
Total fallback computed fake -2.3% edge when no data
fixes_applied: Total fallback returns 0.0 edge when no data

bugs_found: Net rating edge 0.009 * 15 diff = 13.5% swing, TS 0.15

fixes: Previously used raw implied (with vig) - now de-vigs by /1.04
Added L2 regularization C=1.0 to prevent extreme a,b
Added Brier score comparison raw vs calibrated
Added auto suggestion for min_edge based on gap
Previously only tuned totals band, never tuned moneyline edge_threshold despite moneyline being primary market
Now tunes both moneyline and totals
Calibration overconfidence detection raises edge threshold
High totals cap 9.0->9.5 less aggressive after weight fix
min_edge 0.0 -> 0.04 MLB, 0.035 NFL/NBA - 0% meant everything qualified, no filtering
max_total_line 13.5->11.5 MLB - 13.5 run games are Coors outliers with high variance
Added sync between edge_threshold and min_edge

generated_files.note: Future runs will generate more accurate picks_log.csv with: de-vigged market_prob, real away odds, calibrated probs, reduced overconfidence, deterministic K lines, 0 edge when no data
